initial_state: Item revision A is released with drawing D1 and release hash h1.

expected_gate: Released revision immutability guard blocks technical field change.

event_written: No business event; rejection response only until P31 event spine.
audit_or_evidence: Rejected command should carry actor, record, reason, and evidence in P31/P32.
rollback_or_retry: Retry must create ECO/new revision instead of mutating released row.
failure_if_missing: Released revision can be silently changed after use in BOM/WO/quality evidence.

initial_state: Item base UOM BAG exists but is draft/not approved.
